Source.Name: wl-clipboard-rs-tools
Source.Summary: Terminal utilities for accessing the Wayland clipboard, implemented using wl-clipboard-rs
Source.Description: Terminal utilities for accessing the Wayland clipboard, implemented using wl-clipboard-rs providing wl-paste, wl-copy, and wl-clip

Package.Name: wl-clipboard-rs-tools
Package.Summary: Terminal utilities for accessing the Wayland clipboard, implemented using wl-clipboard-rs
Package.Description: Terminal utilities for accessing the Wayland clipboard, implemented using wl-clipboard-rs providing wl-paste, wl-copy, and wl-clip
